data.title: CZ: Users need to manage their own risks. If you cannot afford the downward volatility, please do not touch Meme
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News CZ posted on X platform: "1. People say they like memes. What they mean is that they like you to tell them which token to buy to make money quickly. ("Which CA?" question) Unfortunately, I can't do it, won't do it, and don't know how to do it. 2. The meme coin ecosystem on BSC is not mature yet. Last night, multiple platforms/Dapps in the ecosystem had system performance problems. System performance is a chicken-and-egg problem. Without demand or real traffic, the system can never be perfectly adjusted. You might think they should test it beforehand, and I believe they did, but real traffic patterns are always different. On the bright side, now that there is demand, the platform will improve, albeit with some pain. PvP is also a bit of a myth. People don't want it. Other blockchains have players leading, managing, making markets, or "influencing" which tokens will win. These are also lacking on BSC. A bit confusing. Welcome to the decentralized world. But again, I hope the ecosystem can develop naturally. As of the time of writing, according to Dex Screener, there is a Broccoli with a market value of more than $200 million on the BNB chain. project. Not sure if this is a good or bad thing.
Please manage your risk and don’t touch meme coins if you can’t afford the downside volatility.”

data.title: Gate.io has launched BROCCOLI perpetual contracts, supporting up to 50x leverage
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Gate.io has launched BROCCOLI perpetual contract real-time trading (USDT settlement) on February 14, 2025 (UTC+8), supporting 1-50 times leverage.
Gate.io is the first stop for small currency contracts. According to CoinGecko data, Gate.io has cumulatively supported more than 600 perpetual contract currencies and is the preferred platform for more than 21 million users worldwide.

data.title: Broccoli Token Market Cap Soars to $280 Million After CZ Mentions It
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News GMGN market shows that after CZ mentioned a specific Broccoli token, its market value soared to $280 million, and the 24-hour trading volume was $720 million.
Odaily reminds users that the price of Meme coins fluctuates greatly, so investors are advised to participate with caution.

data.title: Bitget obtains VASP license issued by Bulgarian National Tax Service
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget has obtained a VASP license issued by the Bulgarian National Tax Service. With the VASP license, Bitget will be able to provide comprehensive cryptocurrency services in Bulgaria, including trading, transfers, custody, public offerings, and wallet services.
Bitget Chief Legal Officer Hon Ng said: "Bitget's goal is to provide efficient and compliant services to users throughout the EU. As the EU continues to lead the introduction of regulatory frameworks such as MiCA, we see great potential for sustainable growth and innovation in the region while complying with regulations. In 2025, Bitget will focus on global expansion, especially ensuring that our operations meet the compliance standards of various regions, so as to enhance user trust, ensure long-term growth, and keep up with the latest developments in global regulations."

data.title: Bedrock and OKX Wallet launch an airdrop of 200,000 BR tokens for early bird users
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bedrock published an announcement on the X platform, and jointly with OKX Wallet launched an airdrop event for a total of 200,000 BR tokens for early bird users. The event time is from February 14 to March 8, 2025.

data.title: Solana Surpasses 200 USDT With Notable 24-Hour Increase
data.description: According to Odaily, the cryptocurrency Solana (SOL) has surpassed the 200 USDT mark, currently trading at 200.02 USDT. This marks a 24-hour increase of 3.54%.

data.title: SOL breaks through 200 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 3.54%
data.description: OKX market shows that SOL has broken through 200 USDT and is now at 200.02 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 3.54%. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Barclays Bank Reveals $131 Million IBIT Holdings
data.description: According to Odaily, Barclays Bank, the second-largest bank in the United Kingdom, has disclosed in its documents that it holds IBIT valued at $131 million.

data.title: Ethereum Holesky Testnet Upgrade Scheduled For February 24
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Ethereum's Holesky testnet is set to undergo an upgrade on February 24. Additionally, the Sepolia testnet is scheduled for an upgrade on March 5. The mainnet launch is anticipated to occur on April 8.

data.title: Barclays, the UK's second-largest bank, disclosed in a filing that it holds $131 million worth of IBIT
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Barclays, the second largest bank in the UK, disclosed in a document that it holds IBIT worth $131 million. (Cointelegraph)
